'''鈭歯g-z-p-w''' ('''kangazpewoko''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|transitive verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:kreistle|kreistle]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| ng-z-p-w
|-
! Word class
| [[Transitive verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:kreistle|kreistle]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歯g-z-p-w
|-
! Lemma
| kangazpewoko
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
=== [[Agent]] agreement ===
''[[Patient]] fixed at fourth female singular, telic perfect template.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:thingazpewoko|thingazpewoko]] || [[word:jingazpewoko|jingazpewoko]] || [[word:shingazpewoko|shingazpewoko]] || [[word:kingazpewoko|kingazpewoko]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:thuthungazpewoko|thuthungazpewoko]] || [[word:jujungazpewoko|jujungazpewoko]] || [[word:shushungazpewoko|shushungazpewoko]] || [[word:kukungazpewoko|kukungazpewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

|-

|-

|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:thongazpewoko|thongazpewoko]] || [[word:jongazpewoko|jongazpewoko]] || [[word:shongazpewoko|shongazpewoko]] || [[word:kongazpewoko|kongazpewoko]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:th忙ngazpewoko|th忙ngazpewoko]] || [[word:j忙ngazpewoko|j忙ngazpewoko]] || [[word:sh忙ngazpewoko|sh忙ngazpewoko]] || [[word:k忙ngazpewoko|k忙ngazpewoko]]
|-

|-

|-

''[[Agent]] fixed at third male singular, telic perfect template.''
